column1: Mr Lazylion had had things____________for him___________the other animals for so long that he didn't know what to do.
He_______________his meals prepared for him for two days now, and he wasn't starting to get hungry.
So, he had some Chinese food_______________ - all the way from China.
That filled him up but it's not easy to_______________food delivered in the jungle. He couldn't do that everyday. Whay was he going to do?
He felt very sad. He really wanted to have____________by Ellie and his feet___________by Marty, but they just said 'no'.
